data.title: MiCA Italy: Deadline 30 December 2025 for Exchanges
data.description:

data.title: Here’s Why Bitcoin Volatility Sparks Fresh Attention On MicroStrategy
data.description:
The Bitcoin price volatility is once again drawing attention to MicroStrategy, the company whose strategy has become a major market reference point, with billions in accumulated BTC and a track record of aggressive buying during downturns. As traders search for stability in a shaky market, Strategy’s stance is being watched closely for what it might signal about the next phase of BTC’s trend. Why MicroStrategy’s Next Move Could Redirect Market Momentum Bitcoin’s recent volatility has put MicroStrategy (MSTR), the largest corporate holder of BTC, in the limelight. Walter Bloomberg has revealed on X that analysts are watching closely to see if the company could influence the cryptocurrency’s price if it sells some of its holdings
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/bitcoin-news/bitcoin-volatility-on-microstrategy/

data.title: Significant SOL Transfer from Fireblocks Custody to Anonymous Address

data.title: Gala quietly changes bridge keys after users flag ‘unauthorized’ withdrawals
data.description:
